title: Cerium
description: Some enchantments for your vanilla game.
body:
![Cerium Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f342d8cb3c659e5313b565299b610d5c85c720_0.webp) ###

Welcome to Cerium, your **potentially** favorite enchantment Data Pack!

## What's in it? A total of 15 new enchantments have been added, including 4 curses. | Enchantment | Applies To | Description | | -------- | ------- | ------- | | Maximum | Weapons | Repairs tools as you are using it. | | **_Minimum_** | Weapons | Damages your tools as you are using it. | | Spring Feet | Boots | Increases jump height and increases the safe falling distance. | | Tank | Chestplates | In exchange for more health, you become slower. | | **_Shrinking_** | Boots | Makes you smaller. Also decreases jump height and speed. | | Lucky | Helmets | Increases luck stat. | | Moon Landing | Leggings | Decreases gravity. | | **_Curse of Plonk_** | Any | Increases fall damage multiplier. | | Reflexes | Weapons | Increases attack speed. | | **_Scaled_** | Boots | Opposite of **_Shrinking_**. |~~~~ | Friendly Fire | Weapons | Does more damage to players. | | Flame Walker | Boots | Ditto of Frost Walker, but for Lava. | | Ender Slayer | Weapons | Does more damage to Ender creatures. | | Speed | Leggings | Increases... well, speed. | | Stepping | Boots | Increases... well, step height. |
Ideas! - Add a YouTube video!
- More enchantments.

You guys can also suggest them either on my YouTube Community Page or on my PMC. If you want to check out the others in TheAxolotlOrg, you can go to Zirosi's Github.
## Why _Cerium_? I had an old draft saved to Modrinth for a long time that I had deleted since it had been collecting dust. I still had the old file, but I had to touch it up since the format had changed a lot. I needed to make a mod with a name of an element from the periodic table so i could make a collection with all 118 of them. And this was the first that came to mind!
